summary: This document is a Data Security and Protection Toolkit (DSPT) certificate confirming that KeepMeCompany Ltd has completed a self-assessment and met the required standards for handling personal information. It is valid from September 2024 to June 2026 and includes the company's registered London address. The certificate serves as proof of compliance with NHS data security requirements.
